text:
It was just before sunrise. Farmer Lewis loved dawn. Just hearing birds singing startled him awake.

His breakfast sounded great. Toast sticks!

As Lewis milked his cow. That nice sour goat milk. Just add oats.

The dewdrops were prisms. Rainbow hues. Lewis thought birds.

Maybe chickens.

Oh my!

A monster chased him!

Yes. That snobbish neighbor owl.

Just duck south!

Yes!

It pecked barn eggs!

Lewis hid.

Owl owl owl owl ow-wow-wow owl owl owl owl owl owl owl owl owl owl owl owl owl owl owl owl owl owl owl owl owl owl star!

That owl owl owl owlowlowl owlowlowlowl.



Just stop owl.

Just Ow owl owl owl owl owlowlowlowl owlowlowl owl owl owl OW Owl owl owl owl owlowl owl owl owl owl owl owl owl owl owl owl owl owl owl owl owl owl owlowlowl Ow.

Just ow ow ow owl owl owlowlowlowl owlowlowl owl
